description: EF Core Migration: Social Features Tables (likes, comments, follows, shares, tags, content_tags, trending_snapshots, notifications, favorites)
steps: Add entity classes for Like, Comment, Follow, Share, Tag, ContentTag, TrendingSnapshot, Notification, Favorite to Fexora.Core/Entities
Configure relationships and indexes in FexoraDbContext
Create EF Core migration: dotnet ef migrations add Sprint5_SocialFeatures
Verify migration applies cleanly: dotnet ef database update (with Docker PostgreSQL running)
dotnet build succeeds without errors

description: EF Core Migration: Chat & Monetization Tables (creator_chat_settings, subscription_tiers, subscriptions, subscription_tx, tips, gift_items, ppv_messages, ppv_unlocks, custom_requests)
steps: Add entity classes for CreatorChatSettings, SubscriptionTier, Subscription, SubscriptionTransaction, Tip, GiftItem, PpvMessage, PpvUnlock, CustomRequest to Fexora.Core/Entities
Configure relationships and indexes in FexoraDbContext
Create EF Core migration: dotnet ef migrations add Sprint5_ChatMonetization
dotnet build succeeds without errors

description: EF Core Migration: Referral, Promo, Blocking, Security Tables (referral_codes, referral_redemptions, promo_codes, promo_redemptions, blocked_users, two_factor_auth)

description: Seed data: Default platform settings, default gift items, test admin user
steps: Add seed data in FexoraDbContext.OnModelCreating or a dedicated seeder
Include: default PolicyConfig entries, default GiftItem set, Admin user (if not already seeded)
dotnet build succeeds without errors
